name: em-review
description: Parallel multi-perspective code review across 9 reviewers (5 Claude + 4 GPT/Codex). Cross-model agreement scoring + bounded multi-loop auto-fix (≤ 3 iterations) on by default. Directly-applicable diff suggestions auto-apply via the bundled em-review-editor sub-agent (Read/Edit only); natural-language suggestions go through per-finding AskUserQuestion. Scope is verified via content-hash delta (`git hash-object` over the orchestrator's backup snapshots). Modify-only, no commit; skip with --report-only. Each reviewer is also usable standalone via /em-review:<perspective>.
